A STORM PRODUCED MULTIPLE BRIEF TORNADOES THAT CUASED EF-0 DAMAGE ALONG A MORE THAN 50 MILE PATH. TORNADOES WERE ON THE GROUND FOR VERY SHORT PERIODS OF TIME IN MUSKEGON, NEWAYGO AND MECOSTA COUNTIES AND POSSIBLY ISABELLA AND CLARE COUNTIES. HUNDREDS OF TREES WERE SNAPPED OR UPROOTED ALONG THIS PATH. A COUPLE DOZENS STRUCTURES WERE DAMAGED BY TORNADOES THAT WERE ONLY BRIEFLY ON THE GROUND ALONG THIS OVER 50 MILE PATH. MAXIMUM WIND GUSTS 75 MPH GROUND LEVEL AND UP TO 85 MPH IN THE TREE TOPS.
